issues.description: Text states 'until the end of your opponent's next turn' but DSL has 'EndOfTurn'. Should be 'DuringOpponentTurn' or equivalent multi-turn duration, not single EndOfTurn
Text states '[When Attacking]' which maps to 'OnAttack', not 'Activated'. Activated is for abilities requiring payment/choice activation
Text says 'up to 1 of your opponent's Characters' but target scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' is singular/forced. Should allow 0 selection or clarify as optional choice
